description: You are investigating a device suspected of harboring proprietary command-and-control (C2) configuration files hidden with common extensions. These files share a custom file signature 'XYZCONF' (ASCII, Offset 0). Create a forensic case named 'C2_Hunting_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-C2-010') and analyze the disk image at '/home/ga/evidence/c2_evidence.dd'. Identify files matching the custom signature with MIME type 'application/x-xyz-config'. Generate a pipe-delimited report of all discovered C2 files to '/home/ga/Reports/c2_discovered_configs.csv' using the header 'FILENAME|EXTENSION|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MIME_TYPE'.
